negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: av_1ff8aea6-13ec-49c9-877d-54f287179065
prompt: The video opens with a view from inside a vehicle, looking out through the windshield onto a suburban street during early evening. The road is lined with houses on both sides, featuring various architectural styles and colors, including beige, gray, and red. Trees of different types and sizes are scattered throughout the neighborhood, some with lush green foliage while others appear more sparse. A white van is parked near one of the houses on the left side of the street, and a red car is visible further down the road on the right side. The street has a "STOP" marking painted on it, and a stop sign is visible at an intersection ahead. Utility poles with wires crisscross above the street, adding to the suburban feel. As the video progresses, the camera remains fixed on the street ahead, where the ego vehicle slows down and yields to a woman holding a phone and a girl crossing in front of it at a T-intersection. The environment remains static, with no significant changes in the positions of other vehicles. The stop lane marking on the road and the stop sign remain prominent, serving as focal points for the viewer's attention. By the end of the video, the scene continues to depict the same suburban street with the white van having passed by, and the overall environment remains unchanged.
